home.heroDescription: 4HERFRIKA is raising world class female leaders at the intersection of business and technology
home.wordsOnStreetSub: Take a look at what our members say!
home.campusDescription: We operate through bite-sized communities in tertiary institutions
home.academyDescription: Online learning platform for skill development

about.aboutDescription: At 4HerFrika, we strive to train, mentor, and empower women to become transformative leaders across Africa.
about.whereEveryGirl: Where Every Girl Achieves Their Goal
about.faqDescription: In this section you can find all the answers you are probably looking for. If you still struggle with finding one - don't hesitate to contact us directly.

blog.description: This is a safe space created just for you, with experiences of women from all walks of life targeted to help you find your mojo and beauty in this chaos called LIFE

faq.title: FAQs
faq.description: In this section you can find all the answers you are probably looking for
faq.cantFindAnswer: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Please chat to our friendly team.

footer.subscribeDescription: Subscribe to our newsletter for the latest updates and news

careers.title: Career Corner
careers.heroText: Welcome to 'Career Corner', where you can book a 10 mins call with a mentor for free to ask questions
careers.counselingDescription: You can book a 10 mins call with a mentor for free to ask questions.
careers.becomeMentorDescription: Share your purpose for becoming a mentor and take the first step with us

donate.title: Support Our Mission
donate.description: Your donation helps us reach more girls and create sustainable change across underserved regions.
donate.thankYou: Thank you for your support. Every contribution helps us make a bigger impact.

impact.neverTouched: In one year, we've seen girls who never touched a computer now designing products, coding software, and leading change in their schools and communities.
impact.justTheBeginning: This is just the beginning. By 2030, 4herfrika envisions 2 million women and girls empowered across Africa. Together, we can make it happen

projects.title: Projects
projects.heroTitle: At 4HerFrika, We Believe In Doing, Not Just Dreaming.
projects.heroDescription: Our Projects are grassroots-driven, impact-focused, and designed to uplift girls across Africa through education, technology, and leadership.
projects.introDescription: 4HerAfrika is a movement dedicated to empowering young women across Africa through technology, leadership, and entrepreneurship.
